title: JSM Sandbox Auth Marker v1
description: Read-only contract for /Users/josh/.local/state/jsm/sandbox-auth-ok.json. Flywheel owns this schema; skillos guarded runner owns writing markers that satisfy it.

writer.description: Identity that wrote it, for example skillos-guarded-runner.

writer_session.description: ntm session that wrote the marker.

writer_pane.description: ntm pane that wrote the marker.

what_was_proven.description: Plain-text statement of the safety proof the runner verified.

proof_artifact_path.description: Absolute path to the proof artifact.

hmac_sha256.description: HMAC-SHA256 of the canonical JSON object with hmac_sha256 removed, using ~/.local/state/jsm/marker-hmac-secret.

x-flywheel-contract.writer_contract: Only the skillos guarded runner or its successor writes this marker. All other orchestrators read only.
x-flywheel-contract.reader_contract: Every orchestrator session start, JSM doctor, and JSM sync validates this marker before raw live JSM probes. If invalid, refuse the probe and surface probe_failure_reasons.<scope>=missing_sandbox_auth_marker.
x-flywheel-contract.hmac_input: Canonical compact JSON with keys sorted recursively and hmac_sha256 removed.
invalidation_triggers: JSM credential rotation; skillos drops marker out of band
JSM upgrade; skillos drops marker out of band
